## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue (e.g. Closes #12). -->

## How it was verified
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm run selfcheck` passes
- [ ] Non-trivial logic has a `src/selfcheck.ts` assertion (the smallest thing that fails if it breaks)

## Notes
<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, a `ponytail:` shortcut and its ceiling, follow-ups. -->
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or: it's justified above)
- [ ] No secrets/keys committed
